positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a geometric arrangement of nature elements: a crescent moon phase combined with delicate flowing florals and abstract constellations. The style should be neo-art nouveau mixed with modern minimalist line art. Use a limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, matte gold foil accents, and soft blush pink, set against a clean, white background. The elements should be designed to function as a repeat print or a central chest graphic on apparel. Emphasis on clean silhouettes, negative space utilization, and elegant symmetry. Inspired by celestial maps and botanical drawings.
negative: ugly, distorted, grainy, blurry, artifact, watermark, text, signature, logo, cropped, out of frame, low detail, noise, messy, dirty, bad anatomy
